_description: Numbers-first + iconic-word + contradiction. Higher density per character — denser than baseline. Use for stories with strong numerical anchor.
template: {count} {subject} Vanished in {year}. They Left One Word: {iconic_word}.
example: 115 People Vanished in 1587. They Left One Word: CROATOAN.
style_notes: Two short sentences. First creates scale, second creates intrigue. Iconic word ALL CAPS for retention. Avoid hyperbole adjectives ('mysterious', 'incredible').
